name: How to add your hotel to eDreams.net
description: Get your hotel listed on eDreams.net with Synup's guide. Learn step-by-step how to increase your online presence and attract more bookings. Read now!
main_title: How to add your hotel to eDreams.net
richtext:
What is eDreams.net and why is it important?

eDreams.net is an online travel agency that specializes in providing a variety of travel-related services to its customers, such as booking flights, hotels, car rentals, and vacation packages. eDreams allows property owners to list their properties on the site, giving them access to a large customer base and increased visibility. 

‍

Step-by-step guide to add your business to eDreams.net

‍

  1. Go to the eDreams website (https://www.edreams.net/) 

‍

  1. Navigate to the footer and click the “List your property” link under the eDreams section.

‍

  1. Choose the “Join us” button from the upper right corner of the screen.

‍

  1. Fill out the required personal information and property type in the listed google form.

‍

  1. Once you have filled out the required information's, click “Submit”

‍

  1. Someone from eDreams will review your listing and may contact you for additional information or verification.

‍

  1. Once your property is approved, it will be listed on eDreams.com, and you can start receiving reservations from travelers all over the world.

‍

  1. Manage your property listing and bookings using the tools and resources provided by eDreams ODIGEO Connect. You can update your availability, pricing, and other details, as well as access performance reports and customer support.

‍

Hola! Following these steps should help you list your property on eDreams.com and start attracting travelers to book their stay at your property.

‍
